MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT G. CUMMINGS, TEL. NO. (650) 363-7280 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EDWARD HUNG OF WONG & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 397-2622 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KIN FAT LAM DBA K.S. KITCHEN & BATH COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS Denied. The application for relief is untimely under Code of Civil Procedure section 473 and defendant fails to demonstrate that he is entitled to equitable relief. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KIN LAM's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Continued to May 30, 2012 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153

Notice Of Application For Request For Court Judgemnt Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Kay Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Robert Cummings, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff William Wang, was placed under oath and examined.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Kin Fat Lam as follows:

Damages/Principal - $83760.81
Prejudgment Interest - $62749.62
Attorney's Fees - $18018.50
Costs - $3555.00
Total in the amount of $168,083.93

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT G. CUMMINGS, TEL. NO. (650) 363-7280 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EDWARD HUNG OF WONG & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 397-2622 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT KIN PAT LAM dba K.S. KITCHEN & BATH COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS DENIED. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
